title: Cloud Guard Problem: VCN Security List Port RDP
description: Detects Cloud Guard reporting problem: VCN_Security_List_Port_RDP.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Cloud Guard Problems' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Cloud Guard Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Cloud Guard Logs') and (('Problem Name' = 'VCN_Security_List_Port_RDP'))
